Container.Name: GenreDiscovery
Container.Overview: Genre-aware music discovery: groups your Last.fm top artists by genre, finds similar artists, and automatically adds them plus their studio albums to Lidarr or Headphones. Supports multiple Last.fm and Navidrome accounts. Runs on a configurable schedule (daily/weekly/monthly) or on manual trigger.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Directory containing config.py, cache file and logs. Copy config.example.py to config.py here before starting.
